title: Axehandle
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ud75SHbH/images/9b9476c7e46564569a579ba1e0767bcfbf07fef9.png)

# Axehandle

This is a resource pack made to add a small tweak to every in-game tool except for swords. This small tweak gives many tools a soft, leather handle on its stick.

Although it's a small decoration, it's simply beautiful.



**Note:**

*This resource pack may end up coming out for older versions of Minecraft (1.19, 1.18, 1.17, etc.).*

---

Like this resource pack? How about you try [Animated Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-items)? It adds small, but noticeable animations to some items!

---
*This pack was made by palettemc*
